ddls:
CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name or model number of the microcontroller */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the microcontroller */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microcontroller */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the microcontroller model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the microcontroller */,
  "clock_speed" TEXT /* Clock speed of the microcontroller */,
  "memory_size" TEXT /* Memory size (Flash and RAM) of the microcontroller */,
  "io_pins" INTEGER /* Number of I/O pins */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the microcontroller model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the microcontroller model is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the microcontroller model */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "pin_assignment" TEXT /* JSON object storing pin assignments for all relevant pins */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the signal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the signal (e.g., input, output, bidirectional) */,
  "voltage_level" TEXT /* Voltage level of the signal */,
  "current_limit" TEXT /* Current limit of the signal */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the signal is critical */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the signal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the signal was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a signal */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the signal configuration */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, reviewed, approved) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the version */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_versions_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the user is active */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the signal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_usages" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage of a signal */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the signal is used */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device where the signal is used */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Description of how the signal is used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date the signal was last used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., testing, production) */,
  "usage_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of usage */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the usage is primary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_usages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_usages_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_usages_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., planning, in progress, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the microcontroller model used in the device */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date the device was manufactured */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., in stock, deployed, retired) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the comment is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the comment is resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the comment */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_comments_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
